title: Create Xtreme
description: Create Xtreme is an FPS-optimized modpack designed for smooth automation and engineering with the Create mod on Fabric 1.19.2. It boosts performance while enhancing creativity, making large-scale contraptions run seamlessly! ⚙️🚀
body:
### **Create Xtreme - Optimized Create Modpack**  

**Create Xtreme** is a **performance-focused** modpack designed to enhance the **Create mod experience** while maintaining **stability and efficiency**. It includes **FPS optimizations**, **memory usage reductions**, and **rendering improvements** to ensure smooth automation and large-scale contraptions.  

This modpack features **optimized world generation, refined entity processing, and efficient lighting calculations** for better overall performance. Additionally, **quality-of-life enhancements** improve **inventory management, UI interaction, and block rendering**, making complex builds more seamless.  

Built for **players who want a high-performance, well-optimized Create mod setup**, **Create Xtreme** balances **functionality and efficiency** without unnecessary resource strain.
